channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 23rd March
item.description:
Pothole on the roundabout with a sharp edge.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous / sharp metal protruding from pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
Corner of imperial square pavement. A pole / post has been removed but has been finished poorly and has left very sharp metal sticking out of the ground. This is a trip / fall hazard and a fall on top of this would cause a nasty injury.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trafalgar Street, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 23rd March
item.description:
28 day with 4 way traffic lights plus temp fway closure lift and relay rocking dropped kerb 900x100x30mm STATS (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose and annoying when hit by heavy vehicles..., 23rd March
item.description:
Hi, I know there is work going to be carried out in April 17th but that is a month down the road. It has been inspected apparently and not of your criteria??? Its keeping me up at night. I would like it looked at again and atleast something done to stop the big sound amplified when lorries and HGV vehicles hit it.... its not on and for another month is just not acceptable... come and sit in my room and listen to it... over 3 months plus ive had to put up with this....
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 396a, Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep pothole in the right hand lane, 23rd March
item.description:
VERY DEEP POTHOLE IN THE RIGHT HAND LANE approaching the roundabout
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overhanging road and damaging coaches, 23rd March
item.description:
Moorend Park Road just before you turn left into The Park, Cheltenham, there is a tree on the left hand side which coaches/buses are hitting as they are passing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Moorend Park Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: Multiiple holes on left hand edging, by gate entrance to field, heading towards Badgeworth. What 3 words... speech.slot.memory, 23rd March
item.description:
As above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in Manor Road Swindon Village, 23rd March
item.description:
Two black bags and also garden rubbish dumped near the bridge in Manor Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Manor Court, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole 1ft x 6inches., 23rd March
item.description:
Outside number 37. Reoccurring pothole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pine Bank, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footbridge rotten and treads missing, 23rd March
item.description:
Footbridge in need of replacement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Brockhampton Road, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction caused by fence problem, 23rd March
item.description:
Broken fencing
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 23rd March
item.description:
28 day with 3 way traffic lights CW pothole 800x800x45mm plus x1 NSD perm repair (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover exposed sharp edges, 23rd March
item.description:
Malthouse Lane has No footpath but it does have a large pothole leaving the drain cover exposed with sharp edges. Photo dated 20 Feb 2025. It was also report in Feb by others but nothing has been done. It is a large unavoidable hazzard and if left will become an emergency fix.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Malthouse Lane, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 23rd March
item.description:
Outside number 23. Small but deep

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Pilley Lane, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole near the junction of Langley Road and The Hyde, dangerous for cyclists, 23rd March
item.description:
On the junction near the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Langley Road, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter problem reported on the A40, 22nd March
Litter dumped outside number 170b, 22nd March
item.description:
Please could it be dealt with

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 159, Leckhampton Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One Stop car park is becoming unusable, 22nd March
item.description:
The car park of the One Stop on the Crosshands roundabout is in such a terrible state. The pot holes are now enormous, I don’t think they can be called potholes anymore! This is getting worse and worse. Soon, the car park will be too dangerous to use.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two items of furniture apparently dumped., 22nd March
item.description:
Furniture, wardrobe, chest.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laxton Road, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Multiple large potholes covering across the entire junction, 22nd March
item.description:
On the junction as you turn into and out of Ullenwood Manor Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ullenwood Manor Lane, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
